claims: Replica-independent history identifiers distinguish multiple attestations of one history from incompatible histories.
Pinned Ed25519 replica identities authenticate exact R016-anchor attestations.
Two separately invoked R016 stores can accept different valid sibling spends during isolation.
Independent observers receiving the sibling attestations in opposite orders derive one identical fork proof.
Evidence exchange rewrites, merges, rolls back, and selects neither local history.
